name: Beef Jerky #1 (My Favorite)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, pepper, garlic powder, and onion salt in a bowl.
2. Add the beef roast to the marinade and mix well to ensure it is evenly coated.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 1 hour, or overnight for best results.
4. Preheat the oven to between 150 and 170 degrees Fahrenheit (65-77°C).
5. Place the marinated beef roast on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 12 hours, or until the meat is no longer pink and has a jerky texture.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing into thin strips.
8. Allow the slices to cool completely before serving.
